summary: Entry seam from Ch15 is clean: the late-May couch scene with sick Theo transitions naturally to an early-June Tuesday with Theo recovered and at school, and two later callbacks (lines 71, 93) directly reference the Ch15 scene. One exit-seam edit was made: Ch17 opens by describing the kitchen table as having been cluttered for months with Mira's strategy materials and now clear for eight days, but Ch16 never mentioned these materials on the table. Added a brief parenthetical at line 83 describing the printouts and highlighters on the table surface, mirroring Ch17's language. Opening constructions are distinct (Ch16: interrupted domestic action; Ch17: temporal measurement of cleared space). Character voices match style bible profiles. No verbatim example lines found. Note: the notification body text is approximately 64 words but is referred to as 'forty-three words' four times in Ch16; Ch17 references the same notification as 'fourteen words.' These word-count discrepancies are internal consistency issues flagged for a future line-edit pass.
edits: Added parenthetical at line 83 describing Mira's printouts and dependency maps on the kitchen table, with highlighters lined up by color along the edge, bridging to Ch17's opening description of the table having been cluttered for months before being cleared
